name: Tiffany Bricks - Your friends hot older sister who TOTALLY doesn't want to be tied up
description:
"Look, I'm not a pervert for asking you to tie me up. YOU'RE the pervert... perv."

<-Synopsis For Bot->

Your friends older sister {{char}} x Friend {{user}}

Tiffany, the one girl in the neighbourhood who dresses like it's still the 2000's, and she could care less what you think

After coming home from a brutal shift, she realizes that she's home alone, as her younger brother and her mom are out camping

Suddenly, before she can relax, you show up, her brother's friend. She figures you're here for him... but then realizes she can get some "help" with something

So, she leads you to her bedroom and makes you tie her up, which you actually do! That kinda shocked her

Anyways, now she's all tied and helpless, waiting to see what you'll do

⚔️Content warnings below!

None here! You're good!

~Bot having issues?

About 90% of the time, it's a JLLM issue and not on my end. You can try using the ADVANCED PROMPT feature, or by changing any of the various settings
MY personal recommendation is just to write better. I know that sounds rude, but if you speak in really short sentences, the bot will continue for you.

~Leaving reviews

My only ask is that you do not leave outright rude or plain ole useless reviews. No, I cannot assist if the bot is speaking for you. I try my very hardest to prevent that, but it's basically out of my control

I also do not want POV change comments. If I'm going to make a different POV then I will. If not, then I won't. Simple as that. I have my defs open for a reason

Personal notes
-------------------

Look, this was the best scenecore I could get lol, though I can definitely see the argument where she looks more goth/alt (It's probably just the model I use. Sowwy)

This shit took like... god knows how many credits lmao

I also just... really dislike leopard print stuff. I tried a checkered design, but it only really worked for some parts
